auth.backupResendButton: Send new code to backup email
auth.backupResendErrGeneric: Could not send to backup email.
auth.backupResendInvalidBackup: Please enter a valid backup email.
auth.backupResendLead: We can generate a new code and send it only to another inbox you control (for example Gmail). Enter your password and complete the human check. Any previous code for this step will stop working.
auth.backupResendOk: If your details were correct, a new code was sent to your backup address. Check spam or junk there too.
auth.backupResendPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.backupResendSameAsAccount: Use an address different from your sign-in email.
auth.backupResendTurnstileErr: Could not load human verification. Refresh the page and try again.
auth.backupResendTurnstileMissing: Complete the human verification below first.
auth.emailDelayHint: The email can take up to a minute to arrive. If you don’t see it, check your spam or junk folder.
auth.errCodeDigits: Please enter the 6–7 digit code from your email.
auth.errMissingEmail: Missing email. Please return to the landing page and start a reset again.
auth.errMissingResetChallenge: Missing reset challenge. Please return to the landing page and start a reset again.
auth.errMissingVerifyParams: Missing email or challenge. Please return to the landing page and request a new code.
auth.errPasswordShort: Your new password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errResetCodeDigits: Please enter the 6–7 digit reset code from your email.
auth.resetLead: Enter the code sent to {email} and choose a new password.
auth.resetReturnLanding: Return to the landing page and start the reset again.
auth.verifyReturnLanding: Return to the landing page and request a new code.
billing.leadNonOwner: {school} needs report credits before you can create reports.
billing.leadOwnerLine2: and shared by every school you own (including {school}). Purchases are tied to this school for your records.
billing.ownerOnly: Only school owners can purchase credits. Ask your owner to buy a pack.
billing.packTaxAddedToBase: {taxDetail} is added to the pack price; the total above is what you pay.
billing.paymentsPausedBody: The platform operator has temporarily disabled online card payments. Credit packs and prices may still be shown for reference.
billing.paymentsPausedTestExhausted: Your free test credits for this school are used up. Card purchases will be available again when the operator re-enables checkout — contact them if you need access sooner.
billing.successBody: Thanks. If your credits don't appear immediately, wait a moment for the payment to finish processing.
billing.testConvertLead: Your free test credits for this school are used up. Buy a credit pack below to keep this organisation as a full account.
billing.testTrialActive: Sandbox trial: {n} free test report credits left on this school. Purchase unlocks automatically after they are used.
billing.title: Buy report credits
brand.subtitle: Report-O-Matic
class.bulkPdfNeedStudents: Add pupils to this class before downloading a combined PDF.
class.bulkPdfNotFinished: You can't download all the class reports until they are all finished.
class.bulkPdfNotFinishedTerm: Every pupil needs a finished report for the selected term.
class.duplicatePupilWarning: Warning: this exact first and last name is already used in: {locations}. You can still add this pupil if appropriate.
class.firstLastRequired: First name and last name are required.
class.makeReportsForDisabledShortCourse: Set the class default to standard (three terms) to choose a term preset.
class.makeReportsForHint: Preset term focus for new standard reports (+ New report). Not used when the class default is short course. You can change the term on each pupil’s report form.
class.moveConfirm: Move {who} to {dest}? Their reports will move with them.
class.movePupilFootnote: This keeps the pupil’s reports and data intact, and logs a “moved” event for dashboard stats.
class.nameTimetableTip: If you include the class start time in the Class Name, the time will show on the Timetable.
class.registerPreviewHint: Opens the register PDF in a new tab so you can print or save from the browser viewer.
dash.agentLinkShareHint: Share this link with new school owners.
dash.agentPaymentsBlurb: Referral programme: your agent account must be active for payouts. Long inactivity may end participation. Payout details apply when the platform operator has card payments enabled.
dash.agentPaymentsBlurbPaused: Referral programme: card payouts are paused. Historical earnings may still show once payments resume. Long inactivity may still affect programme participation.
dash.agentPayoutPausedHint: Saving a payout id is available when the platform operator turns card payments back on. Your referral link still works.
dash.agentSectionLead: Your referral link for signups and agent earnings. When card payments are enabled on the platform, you can save a payout account id for commissions.
dash.agentSectionLeadPaymentsPaused: Your referral link for signups and agent earnings. Card payouts are paused on the platform right now; you can still share your link.
dash.guide.classDh1: Open Classes & reports in the menu.
dash.guide.classDh2: Create a class, then add pupils (names and details).
dash.guide.classDh3: Assign a teacher to the class if others will write reports.
dash.guide.classT1: Open Reports & classes in the menu.
dash.guide.classT2: Select the class where you are the assigned teacher.
dash.guide.classT3: Check the pupil list before writing reports.
dash.guide.hubAddSchool1: Start here: use the form above to create an organisation (your first school or an extra one).
dash.guide.hubAddSchool2: Pick a short name for now; you can adjust details after you open its workspace.
dash.guide.hubPickSchool1: When you are ready to work in an existing school, pick it in the list above. Its workspace menu opens next.
dash.guide.hubPickSchool2: Then follow the numbered steps under that menu: letterhead (owners), team, classes, reports. Data & privacy is under Overview when you open a school.
dash.guide.invite1: Open Invite team in the menu.
dash.guide.invite2: Enter colleague emails and pick department head or teacher.
dash.guide.invite3: They sign in with the same email (code or password).
dash.guide.ownerLetterhead1: Open PDF letterhead in the school menu.
dash.guide.ownerLetterhead2: Add your logo and contact lines so exported PDFs match your school.
dash.guide.report1: From the class, open a pupil and their report.
dash.guide.report2: Draft text; use school language settings and AI only as your policy allows.
dash.guide.report3: Mark final when the report is ready for the record.
dash.guide.stepPrivacy1: Use Profile on this dashboard to export your data or close your account if needed.
dash.guide.stepPrivacy2: Open Privacy notice, DPA, or Cookies from the links below when staff or governors need them.
dash.guide.title: Getting started
dash.ownerCreditsHint: When you buy a pack, credits are added to your owner account and shared by every school you own — not per school.
dash.pdfLetterheadHint: Logo (left), tagline under the logo, and text to the right on PDFs. Landscape PNG, JPEG, or WebP — about 3∶1 (±10%), max 4 MB. Server normalizes for the PDF. Save text fields, then preview.
dash.pdfLetterheadLogoHint: PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Roughly 3×1 landscape (±10%). Max 4 MB; optimized for print.
dash.pdfLetterheadTagline: Tagline / subtitle (optional, under logo on PDF)
dash.schoolFocusHint: Select a school to open its workspace below.
dash.schoolWorkspaceMenuHint: Edit the school you selected above.
dash.teacherDownloadsAllReportsHint: Only reports marked final are included.
dash.teacherDownloadsAllReportsTeacherHi: All report periods in one file — each PDF shows the current text (draft or final).
dash.teacherDownloadsBulkReportsEmpty: No reports to download yet — open Reports & classes and work on at least one pupil report.
dash.teacherDownloadsCardLead: Print registers, your weekly timetable, or finished reports from your assigned classes.
dash.teacherDownloadsRegistersHint: One PDF containing the register for each of your classes.
dash.teacherDownloadsReportsNotReady: Download is available when every pupil has a finished report for this choice (same rules as bulk export).
dash.teacherDownloadsTimetableHint: Your weekly lesson grid at this school.
dash.teacherRegistersCalloutHint: One PDF with a register for every class assigned to you. No report term to choose and reports do not need to be finished.
pdf.gradesSectionIntroShortCourse: Numerical ratings use a 0–10 scale for this short course period only (single observation).
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: Close your account permanently? This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountLead: This removes your memberships and sign-in credentials, anonymises your email on reports you authored, and clears related personal rows where possible. You cannot be the only owner of a school — add another owner first.
profile.deleteConfirmPhraseHint: Required if you sign in without a password: type the phrase exactly as shown below.
profile.deleteSoleOwnerError: You are still the only owner of a school. Add another owner or remove that school first.
profile.emailChangeWarning: After you save, you will be signed out. Sign in again using this new email address (and your password or a new code).
profile.emailLockedUntilPassword: Set a password using “Forgot password” on the sign-in page before you can change this email.
profile.lead: Update the name shown on your account, your sign-in email, and your password.
profile.newPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep your current password.
profile.noPasswordEmailChange: Add a password before changing your sign-in email.
profile.noPasswordSetPassword: Add a password before changing it here. Use “Forgot password” on the sign-in page.
profile.passwordMissingHint: You sign in with a one-time code only. To set a password, use “Forgot password” on the sign-in page, then return here.
profile.privacyLead: Download a copy of personal data we associate with your account, read our notices, or close your account (subject to school ownership rules).
report.aiFillHintShort: Fill all 16 grade cells (0–10) for this short course for the most reliable draft.
report.aiHintCombined: Saves your report data (grades and settings) on the server, then generates the parent/PDF comment and teacher preview. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY. Uses first name only.
report.generatedHintShort: End-of-short-course comment. PDF text is canonical; teacher text is its translation. Remove clears both.
report.pageIntroShort: Short course end-of-course report: one 0–10 rubric for the short period and a single parent-facing comment. Term 2 and Term 3 grids are not used.
report.pdfPreviewHint: Opens the PDF as last saved on the server. Save your report first if you have unsaved changes.
report.priorTermsGuidanceHint: Scores from earlier term(s) in the year appear under each field when present, for your reference only.
report.shortCourseGradesHint: Enter grades for the short course only. AI and PDF use this single block. There is no term selector — the report covers one short period.
saas.agentsLead: Create unique agent links and control commission + active status.
saas.creditPacksLead: Manage pricing and how many reports each pack includes.
saas.financeLead: Customer payments in and agent payouts out, with day/week/month/year/YTD filters.
saas.financePaymentsPausedBanner: Card checkout is disabled (ROM_STRIPE_ENABLED is not true). New payments won’t flow in until you turn it back on; figures below may be historical only.
saas.openAiLead: Real-time balance isn’t available via API secret keys; this shows spend based on logged usage events.
saas.promptSetStatus: Set status: pending | eligible | paid | void
saas.referralEarningsLead: View pending/eligible/paid referral commission and control payouts.
saas.searchHint: Results update as you type. (Searches tenant name + owner emails.)
saas.searchPlaceholder: Type a keyword (school name or owner email)…
saas.vatDisclaimer: This is a rough working figure for cashflow and prep—not filing advice. If you charge in several currencies, convert consistently before relying on it. Confirm with your accountant.
saas.vatEstimateSubtitle: From payments recorded as Paid to SaaS, using your server VAT settings (not tax advice).
saas.vatStripeVsTaxBody: Your payment processor settles card payments and may offer tax-calculation aids. That does not replace your company’s own filings: you normally declare VAT through your country’s tax authority (in the UK, typically Making Tax Digital to HMRC). Corporation tax is separate. Use an accountant or approved software for filings.
tenant.bulkDownloadsLead: Download many reports as one combined PDF for faster printing.
tenant.sectionMenuHint: Nothing below appears until you turn on a section. Click a button to show it; click again to hide.
tenant.termReadinessHint: Term readiness: 1, 2, 3 — green when every pupil has a finished report for that term.
timetable.assignTeacherOnClass: Assign a teacher to this class on the class page before adding it to the timetable.
timetable.leadIntro: Set how many rooms and lesson periods this school uses. Click a cell to assign a class to that room row; the teacher is always the one assigned on the class card. If the class has extra meeting days set on the class card (class days), the same period and room are filled on those days automatically. The same room or teacher cannot appear twice in the same period.
timetable.noTeachers: Invite teachers from the dashboard first.
timetable.teacherFromClassHint: Teacher is taken from the class page (assigned teacher). To change who teaches this class, update the class card—not here.
timetable.teacherIntro: Your lessons appear in the grid below. Department heads and owners build the full school timetable.
timetable.title: Timetable
